title: Reading and Use of English – Part 6
description: You are going to read four short extracts about urban planning. For questions 37–40, choose from writers A–D. A writer may be chosen more than once.

content.title: The Role of Green Spaces in Urban Planning

texts.A: Writer A highlights the importance of integrating green spaces in urban planning, arguing that such spaces are vital for community well-being. Green areas provide residents a place to relax and connect with nature. Moreover, they contribute to the [37]overall health of the urban population[/37] by improving air quality and promoting physical activities.
texts.B: Writer B discusses the economic benefits of green spaces, noting that they increase property values and attract tourists. [38]B believes[/38] that while aesthetics are important, the financial aspect should not be overlooked, as it drives investment into urban areas. Green spaces also help manage urban heat through natural shading.
texts.C: Writer C argues that green spaces are often neglected due to budget constraints. Despite the known benefits, [37]C thinks[/37] cities prioritize infrastructure that provides immediate economic returns. C suggests a strategic approach where urban planners consider long-term advantages alongside short-term needs.
texts.D: Writer D emphasizes the social role of green spaces, asserting they foster community interaction and inclusivity. Green spaces serve as venues for public events and gatherings, thus strengthening communal bonds. Unlike [38]B[/38], D is less concerned about the economic return and more focused on the social benefits.

questions.question: Which writer expresses a similar opinion to Writer A about the health benefits of green spaces?
questions.explanation: Both A and C discuss health and well-being benefits, while B and D focus on economic and social factors, respectively.

questions.question: Which writer has a different opinion from Writer B regarding the primary focus of green spaces?
questions.explanation: B focuses on economic benefits, while D emphasizes social roles. A and C mention health and budgetary constraints.

questions.question: Which writer shares Writer D’s view on the importance of social interaction in green spaces?
questions.explanation: A and D both value community well-being and interaction, while B focuses on economics and C on budget constraints.

questions.question: Which writer has a perspective on immediate versus long-term urban planning benefits similar to Writer C?
questions.explanation: A considers long-term health benefits like C, while B emphasizes immediate economic gain and D focuses on social benefits.
